prerequisites: A Customerly account with access to a project.
An API access token (App Token) for the Customerly Public API.
The api_key value to provide to the connector (required, secret).

authMethods.name: API key (access token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with your Customerly access token. The connector takes it in the required secret field api_key; Customerly's Public REST API accepts the token as a Bearer credential in the Authorization header.

setupSteps.title: Open Project Settings in Customerly
setupSteps.body: Log in to Customerly and click the Settings icon in the bottom-left sidebar to open your Project Settings.

setupSteps.title: Copy your access token
setupSteps.body: In Project Settings, select Installation, then find the Public API subsection. Copy the value from the field labeled 'Your Access Token for Customerly'. Keep this token private.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied access token into the connector's required api_key field to authenticate against the Customerly API.

sources.title: How to Obtain Your API Access Token in Customerly
